extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Agent Builder in the Flow view with the tool picker panel open on the right. In the search box, the user has entered "search servicenow," and the Activities results are filtered to ServiceNow-related tools. The "Search Incidents by Incident Number" activity is visibly highlighted as the tool to add under the agent's Tools section.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click the + icon under the Tools section of the agent.
2. In the Choose tool search field, enter "search servicenow".
3. From the Activities results, click on "Search Incidents by Incident Number".

layout.rationale: High density (657 chars) + wide (1.73) or very high text
